name: part_003
file: tmp_【#holoIDChromaticFuture 】Free Partial - hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future [ScI02LHlT-w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Kobo, Zeta, and Kaela are high energy on stage after a performance.
Kobo runs around the stage playfully while Zeta and Kaela try to stop her.
The trio settles down and reflects on being on stage together.
Zeta asks the audience if they know the title of the concert.
Kobo playfully suggests that the 'tallest one' (Kaela) should explain the title.
Kaela explains the meaning of 'Chromatic Future' and its significance for their 5th anniversary.
Kobo and Zeta enthusiastically agree with Kaela's explanation.
Zeta encourages the audience to share their excitement on social media using the concert hashtag.
They talk about seeing the fans' energy and remind them not to make typos in the hashtag.
Zeta asks the audience if they were surprised when the concert in Indonesia was announced.
Kobo expresses her empathy and asks for Kaela's reaction to the news.
Kaela describes her shock and excitement about all nine of them performing in Indonesia.
Zeta discusses the global significance of this first 9-member hololive Indonesia concert.
Kaela shares her ambition for hololive Indonesia to 'dominate the world'.
Kobo leads the group in thanking the fans and the sponsors for making the concert possible.
Zeta and Kaela point out that they are using new 3D models for this concert.
The trio has a playful moment crowding the camera to show off their new models.
Zeta tries to restore order and warns them not to fight on stage.

subtitles.original: Masih semangat ya? Iya nggak sih? Iya nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Are you still energetic? Right? Isn't it? Isn't it?

subtitles.original: Parah sih, ada adrenalin—rasakan ya?
subtitles.english: It's crazy, there's adrenaline—can you feel it?

subtitles.original: Pengen lari aku rasanya nih!
subtitles.english: I feel like running right now!

subtitles.original: Stop stop stop stop stop stop stop!
subtitles.english: Stop stop stop stop stop stop stop!

subtitles.original: Mau ke mana? Stop stop stop!
subtitles.english: Where are you going? Stop stop stop!

subtitles.original: Nanti keringetan lho, nanti keringetan.
subtitles.english: You'll get sweaty later, you'll get sweaty.

subtitles.original: Kaela gimana?
subtitles.english: How about Kaela?

subtitles.original: Aduh, seru banget.
subtitles.english: Man, it's so fun.

subtitles.original: Aku nggak nyangka sih sampai aku bisa ada di sini ya.
subtitles.english: I didn't expect that I could be here.

subtitles.original: Tapi ini ngomong-ngomong konser-nya masih panjang banget.
subtitles.english: But by the way, the concert is still very long.

subtitles.original: Jadi kalian tetap semangat ya sampai akhir!
subtitles.english: So you guys keep up the spirit until the end!

subtitles.original: Semangat semangat semangat semangat!
subtitles.english: Spirit, spirit, spirit, spirit!

subtitles.original: Eh tapi ngomongin konser dari tadi, emang pada tahu judul konser-nya apa?
subtitles.english: Eh, but we've been talking about the concert, does everyone know the title?

subtitles.original: Judul konser kita kali ini adalah Chromatic Future!
subtitles.english: Our concert title this time is Chromatic Future!

subtitles.original: Ada yang tahu nggak artinya apa? Ayo absen!
subtitles.english: Does anyone know what it means? Let's check!

subtitles.original: Nah, ini, Kobo paling tahu.
subtitles.english: Now, this, Kobo knows best.

subtitles.original: Nih, ya...
subtitles.english: Here, you see...

subtitles.original: Ya, yang ngejelasin yang paling tinggi. Ayo let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, the tallest one will explain. Come on, let's go!

subtitles.original: Segitu ya... ya udahlah, ya udah nih.
subtitles.english: Is it like that... alright then, alright here it is.

subtitles.original: Nih ya guys ya buat kalian yang belum tahu, Chromatic Future itu artinya tuh...
subtitles.english: Here it is guys, for those of you who don't know, Chromatic Future means...

subtitles.original: ...masa depan yang berwarna-warni.
subtitles.english: ...a colorful future.

subtitles.original: Jadi karena hololive Indonesia kan udah lima tahun nih...
subtitles.english: So since hololive Indonesia has been around for five years...

subtitles.original: ...kita sama-sama dari hari satu sampai sekarang.
subtitles.english: ...we've been together from day one until now.

subtitles.original: Nah, jadi itu untuk ke depannya kita tuh juga harapannya tuh...
subtitles.english: So for the future, our hope is also...

subtitles.original: ...kita bisa nyiptain waktu dan memori yang berwarna-warni sama seluruh fans dari hololive Indonesia!
subtitles.english: ...we can create colorful times and memories with all the fans of hololive Indonesia!

subtitles.original: Ya gitu, betul Kaela Kovalskia! Cakep!
subtitles.english: Yeah like that, you're right Kaela Kovalskia! Nice!

subtitles.original: Nah, kalian sekarang udah pada tahu kan karena tadi udah dijelasin sama Kaela.
subtitles.english: Now, you all know now because it was explained by Kaela.

subtitles.original: Kalau gitu, konser-nya kan udah mulai nih.
subtitles.english: In that case, the concert has already started.

subtitles.original: Kalian mau nge-post soal konser ini di medsos, jangan lupa...
subtitles.english: If you want to post about this concert on social media, don't forget...

subtitles.original: ...hashtag holoIDChromaticFuture ya!
subtitles.english: ...hashtag holoIDChromaticFuture, okay!

subtitles.original: Karena kita pengen banget lihat kalian tuh apa sih, pengen lihat semangat kalian!
subtitles.english: Because we really want to see... what is it, want to see your spirit!

subtitles.original: Ya itu, betul banget, iya nggak?
subtitles.english: Yeah that, very true, right?

subtitles.original: Jangan typo, jangan typo!
subtitles.english: No typos, no typos!

subtitles.original: Asik, share ke semua, oke? Jadi tapi jujur deh...
subtitles.english: Cool, share with everyone, okay? So, but honestly...

subtitles.original: ...kalian tuh pas dibilang kita bakal konser lho di Indonesia, kalian pada kaget nggak sih?
subtitles.english: ...when you were told we're going to have a concert in Indonesia, were you guys surprised?

subtitles.original: Halo? Ada yang dengerin?
subtitles.english: Hello? Is anyone listening?

subtitles.original: Betul! Aku setuju juga.
subtitles.english: Right! I agree too.

subtitles.original: Aku merasakan empati terhadap... ini adik saya Zeta.
subtitles.english: I feel empathy towards... this, my little sister Zeta.

subtitles.original: Iya, empati, iya iya.
subtitles.english: Yeah, empathy, yeah yeah.

subtitles.original: Gimana Kaela Kovalskia?
subtitles.english: How about Kaela Kovalskia?

subtitles.original: Aku juga waktu itu nggak nyangka banget kayak 'Hah? Beneran? Ini riil nih?' gitu kan.
subtitles.english: I also at that time didn't expect it at all, like 'Huh? Really? Is this real?' like that.

subtitles.original: Kayak 'Loh? Bisa gitu? Akhirnya...'
subtitles.english: Like 'Wait? Is that possible? Finally...'

subtitles.original: ...mana udah bersembilan di Indonesia pula ya kan. Keren banget!
subtitles.english: ...especially with all nine of us in Indonesia too, right. So cool!

subtitles.original: Ini kan konser pertama hololive Indonesia yang bersembilan.
subtitles.english: This is the first hololive Indonesia concert with all nine of us.

subtitles.original: Sebenarnya tuh nggak hanya ini tuh momen terbesar dan terpenting juga untuk fans hololive Indonesia...
subtitles.english: Actually, not only is this the biggest and most important moment for hololive Indonesia fans...

subtitles.original: ...tapi seluruh dunia juga pasti bakal nonton nggak sih? Iya nggak?
subtitles.english: ...but the whole world will definitely watch too, right? Isn't it?

subtitles.original: Iya iya makasih-makasih semuanya.
subtitles.english: Yeah yeah thanks-thanks everyone.

subtitles.original: Wait, tapi tentu saja ini pencapaiannya nggak bakal cuma sampai di sini aja kan.
subtitles.english: Wait, but of course this achievement won't just stop here, right.

subtitles.original: Jadi next-nya mungkin kita bisa apa ya, dominating the world gitu.
subtitles.english: So next, maybe we can... what is it, dominating the world like that.

subtitles.original: We are ready! Ready ready ready ready!
subtitles.english: We are ready! Ready ready ready ready!

subtitles.original: Betul banget Kaela, Zeta. Selain dari dukungan fans, in this opportunity...
subtitles.english: Very true Kaela, Zeta. Besides the fans' support, in this opportunity...

subtitles.original: ...kita juga mau mengucapkan terima kasih untuk semua sponsor yang mendukung terjadinya konser ini!
subtitles.english: ...we also want to say thank you to all the sponsors who supported this concert!

subtitles.original: Terima kasih! Thank you thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you thank you!

subtitles.original: Eh tapi ngomong-ngomong di konser ini kayaknya ada yang beda nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Eh, but by the way, in this concert, it seems like there's something different, isn't there?

subtitles.original: Ela kamu sadar nggak? Soalnya kamu paling peka nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Ela, do you notice? Because you're the most sensitive, aren't you?

subtitles.original: Wait, ya sadarlah. Kalau Kobo mah nggak bakal sadar.
subtitles.english: Wait, of course I notice. As for Kobo, she won't notice.

subtitles.original: Nih nih nih, yang beda tuh kali ini tuh model kita.
subtitles.english: Here, look at this, what's different this time is our models.

subtitles.original: Ini model baru nih!
subtitles.english: This is a new model!

subtitles.original: Kameranya dekatin ke aku! Kameranya dekatin ke aku!
subtitles.english: Bring the camera closer to me! Bring the camera closer to me!

subtitles.original: Nah mulai-mulai. Ka mau lihat keimutan Kobo nih.
subtitles.english: Here we go. You want to see Kobo's cuteness.

subtitles.original: Wait wait wait, sini sini sini... ini kamera diambil Kobo semua nggak sih?
subtitles.english: Wait wait wait, over here... is this camera all taken by Kobo?

subtitles.original: Ini ke aku juga, aku juga! Jangan Kobo doang!
subtitles.english: To me too, me too! Not just Kobo!

subtitles.original: Stop stop stop stop stop! Mulai mulai mulai... semua kamera diambil!
subtitles.english: Stop stop stop stop stop! Here they go... taking all the camera!

subtitles.original: Oke oke oke, kalau gitu... aduh sampai kehabisan napas.
subtitles.english: Okay okay okay, in that case... man, I'm out of breath.

subtitles.original: Jangan rebutan di depan konser!
subtitles.english: Don't fight in front of the concert!

subtitles.original: Kalau Zeta udah ngomong...
subtitles.english: When Zeta has spoken...
